asset_name: Cleanup Feedback Set — dirt counts and post-clean sparkle
shared_properties: Bottom floor zone follows the room shell floor band.
Tiny pixel clusters stay readable without hiding the floor color.
All states support a calm, low-stress pet-care tone.
differences: This file carries dirt count feedback and cleanup reward sparkle states.
Bowls, bars, and Echo body art stay outside this task.

reference_images.label: proxy_environment_spacing
reference_images.purpose: Proxy layout reference for the lower floor band and dirt spacing.

reference_images.label: proxy_obstacle_cluster
reference_images.purpose: Proxy low-resolution cluster reference for keeping dirt and sparkle states readable in tiny groups.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/pico_echo/trial_5/obstacles_cage_cleanup_feedback_set.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under obstacles_cage_cleanup_feedback_set.
runtime_notes: Create a 5-column TextureAtlasLayout for clean, dirt counts, and sparkle reward states.
Swap atlas frames when poop_count crosses the 1, 3, and 5 thresholds or when a clean action completes.
Render the strip on the floor band z layer beneath the happiness HUD.

context.usage: Shows dirt buildup at 1, 3, and 5 marks plus a short sparkle reward after cleaning.

state_rules: dirty_1 places one 2x2 mark in the floor band.
dirty_3 places three marks spread across left, center, and right floor lanes.
dirty_5 places five marks with a minimum 8px spacing between centers.
post_clean_sparkle replaces dirt with three 3x3 star pixels using #FFF1E8 and #C2C3C7.

shape.silhouette: 128x18 floor strip with dirt marks or sparkle stars confined to the lower cage band.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 640x18px with five 128x18 states.
Dirty states keep every mark fully inside y=0..17 of the local frame so the scene placement lands on world y=110..127.
Post-clean sparkle removes all brown dirt pixels and shows exactly three sparkles for a brief reward cue.
No state obscures the happiness bar zone at world y=126..127.
